papers.title: EFX Allocations Exist on Multi-Graphs
papers.abstract: We study the fair allocation of indivisible goods among agents, with a focus on limiting envy. A central fairness notion is envy-freeness up to any good (EFX), which requires that any envy toward another agent vanishes after the removal of any single good from the latter's bundle. The existence of EFX allocations is considered a major open problem in fair division. So far, it has only been established in limited settings. Christodoulou et al. [2023] proved the existence of EFX allocations for graphical valuations. In this setting, the agents correspond to the nodes of an underlying graph, and the goods correspond to the edges, and any good has positive value only for the endpoints of the corresponding edge. Their proof crucially relies on the restriction that the graph is simple, meaning that for any pair of agents, there is at most one good that has value to both. For multigraph valuations, where multiple goods may be valued by the same pair of agents, only partial results are known. Amanatidis et al. [2024] and Kaviani et al. [2025] obtained 2/3 and sqrt(2)/2 approximations of EFX, respectively; Kaviani et al. [2024] established existence under restricted additive valuations; and Afshinmehr et al. [2025a] proved existence under the assumption that the shortest cycle containing non-parallel edges has length at least 4. In this paper, we resolve this open problem by proving the existence of EFX allocations for multigraph instances under cancelable valuations, a strict superclass of additive valuation functions. Our proof is algorithmic and computes such allocations in polynomial time when the valuation functions are cancelable. This work contributes to the small number of EFX existence results that apply to an arbitrary number of agents.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 公平分配不可分物品时，如何消除嫉妒是一个核心难题。EFX（无妒忌到任意商品）是一种强公平标准，但其存在性长期悬而未决。此前仅在简单图模型中被证明，本文聚焦更一般的多图模型——允许多个物品被同一对代理人共同估值，这是更具表达力但也更难处理的设定，旨在解决该模型下EFX分配的存在性问题。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 模型中每个物品对应一条边，代理人作为节点，仅对与其相连的边有估值。多图允许同一对节点间有多条边，即多个物品被同一对代理人共同估值。代理人拥有可取消的估值函数（比加性更广），目标是找到一个完全分配，使得任一代理人对他人持有的任何单个物品移除后都不再嫉妒，即满足EFX性质。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文证明了在任意多图实例和可取消估值下，EFX分配始终存在，并提供了多项式时间算法来构造这样的分配。这是首个在不限制图结构或多图循环长度的情况下，为多图模型建立精确EFX存在的结果，显著扩展了已知的适用范围，解决了该方向上的一个公开问题。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 作者设计了一个三阶段算法：首先为每对代理人的边构造两个视角下的‘单位束’划分；然后通过贪心选择和路径重路由构建一个结构良好的部分分配；最后利用‘支持对’和‘倾倒’操作完成剩余物品的分配。关键是通过势函数和森林状嫉妒图结构控制复杂性。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 结果依赖于可取消估值这一特定函数类，对更一般的单调估值是否成立仍是开放问题。尽管如此，论文的价值在于其清晰的算法框架和对多图结构的深刻处理，为后续研究提供了新工具。最值得读的是其构造性证明思路和‘倾倒’技术的设计巧思。

papers.title: Epistemic Pairwise Maximin Share
papers.abstract: We introduce epistemic pairwise maximin share (EPMMS), a new fairness notion for fair division of indivisible goods. Two fundamental notions in this setting are envy-freeness up to any item (EFX) and pairwise maximin share (PMMS), with PMMS being stronger than EFX. While EFX has been extensively studied, far less is known about PMMS. Recent work shows that relaxing EFX via an epistemic perspective leads to substantial progress on the EFX problem, raising the question of whether a similar approach can advance our understanding of PMMS. Motivated by this, we initiate the study of EPMMS, the epistemic relaxation of PMMS. EPMMS is more challenging than EEFX: the key approaches underlying recent progress on epistemic EFX inherently fail to extend to EPMMS. We establish the following results. (1) For additive valuations, $4/5$-EPMMS allocations exist and can be efficiently computed. (2) For bivalued valuations, EPMMS allocations exist and can be efficiently computed; in fact, we obtain the stronger guarantee of epistemic groupwise maximin share (EGMMS), which also strengthens the existence of MMS allocations for this setting. (3) We prove that EPMMS allocations exist in two settings where MMS allocations need not exist: instances with three additive agents or two types of additive agents.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 为什么在不可分物品分配中难以实现强公平？传统公平概念如EFX和PMMS长期面临存在性难题，尤其是更强的PMMS知之甚少。本文受近期‘认知视角’放松EFX（EEFX）取得进展的启发，提出将同样思路用于PMMS，探索是否能通过允许个体基于信念验证公平来突破存在性障碍，从而填补公平分配中一个关键但被忽视的方向。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 作者研究n个代理人分配一组不可分物品的问题，每个代理人有加性估值函数。核心创新是定义‘认知配对最大最小份额’（EPMMS），即每个代理人可假想地重新划分他人物品，只要存在一种划分使其认为自己的分配满足PMMS即可视为公平。该模型弱化了实际分配结构要求，仅依赖个体对公平的可证信念，使问题更具灵活性。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文证明了EPMMS在多种场景下的存在性：对于加性估值，存在并可高效计算4/5近似EPMMS；对于双值估值，存在精确EPMMS，甚至更强的EGMMS；在三人或两类代理人情形下也存在精确EPMMS。这些结果首次展示了PMMS类公平在较广设定下的可行性，尤其在MMS不存时仍成立，表明EPMMS更具鲁棒性。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 作者采用两种核心技术路径：一是将任意排序实例归约到相同物品排序情形，利用Envy Cycle Elimination算法结合非退化假设证明近似存在性；二是针对双值情形，设计基于字典序最优划分的贪心算法，并通过归纳构造个体的认知证书。后者巧妙结合了leximin划分与子集替换引理，确保信念分配满足群组公平。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: EPMMS虽推进了PMMS理解，但其认知性质依赖理想化信念构造，实际中代理人未必能发现证书。此外，通用存在性仍未解决，且技术路径无法直接扩展至更广估值类。最值得读的是其模型抽象方式与双值情形的紧致分析，为公平性松弛提供了新范式，开放问题极具引导性。

papers.title: Stable and Fair Random Allocations in a Two-Sided Discrete-Concave Market
papers.abstract: Random allocations are widely used to handle ties and indifferences in two-sided environments. In such environments, commonly used procedures such as random tie-breaking may fail to ensure stability and fairness from an ex ante perspective. We show that when agents have discrete concave (M$^\natural$-concave) valuations, there exists an ex ante stable and fair allocation. To establish this result, we relate our framework to the model of stability introduced by Alkan and Gale. In particular, we show that ex ante stable and fair fractional allocations are exactly characterized as Alkan--Gale stable outcomes under choice functions induced from concave closures together with a symmetric strictly convex tie-breaking rule. We further prove that any ex ante stable fractional allocation can be decomposed into a lottery over stable deterministic allocations, using a generalization of the Birkhoff--von Neumann theorem. Finally, we study a setting that does not rely on cardinal valuations and instead assumes ordinal preferences. Within this ordinal framework, we establish the existence of an ex ante stable and fair fractional allocation. This setting is formulated within the matching-with-contracts framework under matroid constraints. The resulting class includes existing models, such as one-to-many random allocation with responsive choice correspondences, and captures a wide range of applications, including controlled school choice with lotteries.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 为什么标准的随机匹配机制在存在偏好无差异时会破坏事前公平与稳定？本文指出，在双边市场中，简单的随机破环（random tie-breaking）虽能生成事后稳定的匹配，但从期望角度看可能不稳定且不公平。现有研究多依赖响应性假设，但在非响应性约束（如多样性配额）下失效。本文旨在突破这一限制，建立更普适的稳定与公平共存框架。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 作者如何刻画代理人在有无差异和复杂约束下的选择行为？模型设定为工人与企业的双边匹配市场，双方拥有M⁴-凹估值函数，该结构能表达类型配额、保留席位等非响应性约束。通过凹闭包将离散效用扩展至分数分配，并引入对称严格凸破环规则定义唯一选择函数，从而构建分数稳定与双重强事前稳定的概念。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文最关键的发现是：在M⁴-凹市场中，事前稳定与公平的随机分配必然存在，且可通过Alkan-Gale稳定性的等价刻画来构造。此外，任何事前稳定分配都能分解为事后稳定确定性匹配的彩票组合。这推广了Birkhoff-von Neumann分解，并在序数偏好下建立了matroid-responsive情形的存在性。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 作者如何连接离散凸分析与匹配理论？核心技术是利用M⁴-凹函数的凹闭包导出满足一致性、持久性和规模单调性的选择函数，进而嵌入Alkan-Gale的分数匹配框架。通过广义Birkhoff-von Neumann定理实现分数解到随机机制的转化，并借助支撑超平面论证联合可实现性，使事前效用可达。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 论文依赖M⁴-凹性或matroid-responsive等结构性假设，在完全一般序数偏好下结论不成立。尽管如此，其价值在于为受控学校选择等现实场景提供了坚实的理论基础。最值得细读的是模型如何统一多种政策约束，以及证明中选择函数与稳定性概念的精巧耦合。

papers.title: Convergence of Replicator Dynamics in the Repeated Prisoner's Dilemma with Restarts
papers.abstract: We investigate a population of self-interested agents playing a repeated Prisoner's Dilemma under the trigger-restart mechanism. Under such a mechanism, agents play a sequence of symmetric games with their partner, and restart the interaction if their actions disagree. Our work focuses on the convergence of replicator dynamics in a well-mixed population of agents, where the emergence of cooperation is challenged by the individual incentive for exploitation. Formulating the corresponding parametrised normal-form game, with agents each adopting a length-m strategy sequence, we show that increasing the strategy length enables cooperation to emerge and stabilise. We provide exact convergence guarantees for restricted strategy lengths and, in the general payoff configuration, provide the necessary parametric conditions for the stability of cooperative strategies. By deriving an exact formula for the number of stable sequences, we find structural properties necessary for stability, as agents must learn to initially defect - the so-called "hazing period" - before cooperating indefinitely. Our analysis shows that, while optimal cooperative sequences exist, agents favour less-optimal sequences with a longer hazing period, which possess larger basins of attraction.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 为什么在自利个体组成的群体中能自发出现稳定合作？传统重复囚徒困境中，即使存在惩罚机制，个体仍可能因短期诱惑而背叛。本文关注一个关键缺口：在大规模随机配对的群体中，合作行为能否通过简单的学习规则从局部互动中自发涌现，而非依赖外部机制或全局协调。这触及了社会规范如何内生形成的根本问题。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 作者构建了一个基于复制动力学的大群体演化模型，其中每个智能体采用固定长度的行动序列策略，在重复囚徒困境中与随机对手交互。一旦双方行动不一致，互动立即重启。策略空间由长度为m的动作序列构成，末尾动作无限重复。该设定将长期关系简化为可比较的有限策略，并通过重启机制内生地制造‘信任成本’，从而捕捉合作建立的动态过程。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文证明，随着策略长度增加，纯粹背叛不再能主导群体演化，合作可通过一种‘新生训练期’（hazing period）稳定存在——即双方先共同背叛若干步，之后永久合作。这种序列构成严格纳什均衡且指数稳定。有趣的是，最优合作序列反而不如具有更长背叛初期的次优序列容易被群体采纳，因其吸引域更大。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 作者通过分析复制动力学系统的雅可比矩阵特征值，证明严格纳什均衡的指数稳定性，并利用几何方法构造不变集来界定吸引域边界。关键技巧是聚焦于‘最后一步合作者’与全背叛者的二维子空间，推导出分离超平面的显式表达式，进而推广到整个单纯形结构，揭示了高维策略空间中的收敛路径。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 模型依赖无限群体与确定性复制动力学，忽略了有限种群中的随机漂变和探索噪声，可能高估收敛速度与稳定性。此外，策略空间离散且固定长度，限制了对自适应记忆的研究。尽管如此，该文对理解合作如何通过简单规则与历史依赖在去中心化系统中涌现提供了严谨的动态视角，其‘新生训练期’机制尤其值得深入探讨。

papers.title: Fair Online Resource Allocation
papers.abstract: We study the problem of fair online resource allocation, motivated by applications such as refugee resettlement and airline scheduling, where agents arrive sequentially and must be assigned to facilities with limited capacities. We introduce a model that maximizes the overall welfare subject to resource constraints and a Lipschitz fairness requirement, which ensures that similar agents arriving in the same batch receive similar expected outcomes. We first analyze the offline problem, proving that the value of the optimal fair allocation is at least an $Ω(1/γ)$ fraction of the optimal unfair allocation, where $γ$ is the fairness coefficient, thereby bounding the price of fairness. For the online setting, we propose an algorithm based on dual mirror descent that enforces fairness constraints within batches while estimating optimal dual variables. We prove that this algorithm achieves sublinear regret relative to the optimal offline fluid benchmark. Finally, we validate our theoretical results using real-world data from the Refugee Economies Programme, demonstrating the algorithm's performance and examining the trade-offs between welfare maximization and fairness enforcement.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 本文研究在线资源分配中的公平性问题，动机来自难民安置、航空调度等高风险场景。传统算法追求总体福利最大化，可能导致相似个体因微小差异或到达顺序而获得悬殊结果，违背个体公平原则。作者关注如何在不严重牺牲效率的前提下，在批次到达的在线设置中实现可证明的公平性，填补了公平性与动态资源约束协同建模的研究空白。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 模型考虑多批次到达的代理，需分配至有容量限制的设施。每个代理有类型，决定其在各设施的收益与资源消耗。目标是最大化总期望收益，同时满足资源硬约束和个体公平约束：同一批次内相似代理（由距离函数衡量）的期望收益差受其差异程度的线性约束（Lipschitz公平）。决策为随机分配策略，确保公平性在事前期望层面成立。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文证明了公平性的‘代价’是有界的：离线公平解的目标值至少是离线非公平流松弛解的Ω(1/γ)倍，其中γ是公平参数。在线方面，提出了基于对偶镜面下降的算法，能在满足批次内公平约束的同时，实现O(√T)的期望后悔界，这是首个在Lipschitz公平约束下达到次线性后悔的结果。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 为证明公平代价界，作者设计了一个‘公平水填充’构造算法，通过动态调整非公平最优解来满足公平约束，并论证其近似比。对于在线算法，核心是将公平约束融入每批次的对偶更新：在求解局部公平分配时，利用镜面下降学习资源的对偶变量（影子价格），从而平衡当前公平分配与长期资源消耗。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 模型假设批次内公平且类型已知，可能难以完全捕捉现实复杂性；算法依赖于求解每批次的凸优化子问题，计算开销需考量。尽管如此，论文的价值在于清晰地量化了公平与效率的权衡，并提供了兼具理论保证和实证有效性的算法框架，其公平水填充思想和对偶学习架构对相关领域有启发意义。

papers.title: Generalised Eigenvalue Geometry of Semantic Adversarial Attacks
papers.abstract: Recent empirical work shows that semantically equivalent paraphrases can fool financial sentiment classifiers: although a paraphrase remains close to the original under a strong reference embedding, it may shift the target model's representation enough to change the predicted class. Existing robustness theory either assumes a single-model threat model or focuses mainly on empirical attack algorithms. We develop a continuous local model of semantic paraphrase perturbations that captures this two-model structure. We show that the worst-case local displacement of the target representation, subject to a proxy-model budget, is governed by the largest generalised eigenvalue of a matrix pencil $(A,B)$ constructed from the Jacobians of the two embedding maps. The resulting attackability index $λ^*(x)$ is intrinsic to the local paraphrase geometry and the chosen embedders, yields a closed-form prediction-flip condition for affine readouts, and supports conservative population and finite-sample attackability certificates. For uniform control over classes of affine readouts, we derive a distribution-free VC bound for binary attackability indicators and a scale-sensitive margin bound based on an attackability-adjusted margin that subtracts a local geometric penalty from the standard classifier margin. We also connect the continuous theory to discrete paraphrase search, identify an asymmetry between successful and unsuccessful finite searches, and give a covering condition under which the discrete and continuous settings agree. Finally, we propose an empirical verification framework using soft-token relaxations and generated paraphrase sets to assess the local eigenvalue geometry, prediction-flip condition, and finite-search approximation on a deployed financial-text classifier.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 为什么现有对抗攻击理论难以解释语义级扰动？传统对抗样本依赖微小像素或词向量扰动，但在金融文本中，语义等价的改写就能欺骗分类器。这揭示了一个结构性矛盾：强语义模型认为改写相近，但目标模型却产生截然不同的表示。现有理论局限于单模型威胁或纯经验算法，无法刻画这种双模型间的几何分歧。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 论文研究在局部语义邻域内，代理嵌入模型约束扰动范围，目标嵌入模型决定分类响应的两阶段设定。输入是原始文本及其软令牌或生成的同义句，输出是目标表示的最大位移与预测翻转情况。通过雅可比矩阵定义局部几何，并以广义特征值量化脆弱性，实验在金融短语库上用FinBERT和Sentence-BERT进行验证。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文提出了局部攻击性指数λ*(x)，即由两个嵌入模型雅可比构成的矩阵束的主广义特征值，它闭式刻画了最坏情况下的表示位移。该指数导出了预测翻转条件，并形成了攻击性调整边界与泛化界。实证显示该指数能有效排序真实翻转难度，AUC达0.91，验证了几何模型对实际脆弱性的解释力。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 作者将离散文本空间中的语义扰动建模为连续局部参数化流形，利用代理与目标嵌入的拉回度量构建矩阵束(A,B)。其最大广义特征值决定了在代理预算下目标表示的最大可能位移。这一几何量自然引出面向固定读出头的调整边界，并通过VC维与Rademacher复杂度推广至数据依赖类。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 理论基于局部一阶近似，非线性效应可能导致高估攻击性；局部坐标系的选择影响数值稳定性；有限搜索无法提供全局鲁棒性证明。最值得读的是其将双模型分歧转化为几何谱分析的视角，以及攻击性调整边界的构造逻辑，这对理解语义鲁棒性的内在机理提供了新工具。

papers.title: Compute Efficiency and Serial Runtime Tradeoffs for Stochastic Momentum Methods
papers.abstract: Stochastic momentum methods such as heavy ball (HB), Nesterov momentum, and variants of Accelerated SGD (ASGD) [Kidambi et al., 2018] are widely used in modern training, but their stochastic benefits depend on two distinct quantities: serial runtime, the number of iterations needed to reach a target accuracy, and compute efficiency (CE), the inverse total gradient-query or FLOP cost. Larger batches reduce serial runtime without hurting CE only when the contraction gap grows linearly with batch size. We study stochastic HB and ASGD for consistent linear regression with Gaussian covariates and prove finite-dimensional, discrete-time lower bounds on their batch-size tradeoffs. Our first result shows that HB does not improve the CE frontier over SGD for arbitrary spectra; rather, it preserves SGD-level CE over a larger batch-size window, allowing larger batches to reduce serial runtime until HB reaches its deterministic accelerated scale. This window can be a factor $\sqrtκ$ larger than the SGD critical batch size. For ASGD, the picture is more spectrum-dependent: for rapidly decaying power-law spectra, ASGD improves small-batch CE over HB/SGD, but as batch size grows it trades this CE advantage for improved serial runtime. Synthetic linear-regression experiments verify these qualitative regimes, including near-overlap of ASGD and HB for slowly decaying spectra and the predicted CE--serial tradeoff for rapidly decaying spectra.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 现代深度学习训练广泛使用动量方法，但在小批量下其加速效果常不显著。本文关注一个核心矛盾：如何在提升串行运行时间的同时保持计算效率。现有工作多聚焦于批大小为1的情况，缺乏对不同批大小下性能权衡的系统理解，尤其是重球法（HB）和加速SGD（ASGD）在真实训练场景中的表现差异。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 研究基于带高斯协变量的一致线性回归问题，分析重球法和ASGD在离散时间下的收敛行为。输入为数据协方差矩阵的谱分布，输出为达到目标误差所需的迭代步数与总梯度查询成本。通过理论下界与合成实验结合的方式，在不同衰减速度的幂律谱上评估两种方法的串行时间和计算效率权衡。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文证明重球法不能改善SGD的最优计算效率前沿，但能在更大批大小范围内维持该效率，从而延长线性加速窗口。相比之下，ASGD在小批量时具有更高的计算效率，但随着批大小增加，会逐步将这部分优势转化为更快的串行收敛，最终达到确定性加速尺度。实验验证了不同谱衰减速率下的这些定性规律。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 作者通过建立增广状态向量的协方差动力学，推导出关于谱半径的递归关系，并利用高斯四阶矩公式进行上界估计，进而得到最优谱隙的下界。该方法统一处理了随机噪声影响，允许在任意谱和所有稳定参数下得出均匀成立的下界，揭示了批大小、谱结构与算法选择之间的精细交互机制。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 理论结果依赖于一致线性回归设定，非凸或含噪声情形的推广需进一步研究。尽管实验支持主要结论，但真实神经网络的复杂动态可能偏离假设。最值得阅读的是其对计算效率与串行时间的分离分析框架，以及关于动量方法在批大小扩展中角色转变的新视角。

papers.title: UBP2: Uncertainty-Balanced Preference Planning for Efficient Preference-based Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Preference-based RL provides an approach to learning reward models from pairwise comparisons of behaviors, bypassing the need for explicit reward design. However, existing methods typically rely on passive data collection and suffer from poor sample efficiency, especially during the early stages of learning. We introduce a model-based approach that actively directs exploration by jointly reasoning over uncertainties in the reward, dynamics, and value functions. Our method, Uncertainty-Balanced Preference Planning (UBP2), uses ensembles of reward, dynamics, and value function models to evaluate candidate trajectories according to a unified score that combines expected reward, terminal value, and epistemic uncertainty. Planning under this objective yields an explicit tradeoff between exploitation and information acquisition without requiring ad hoc exploration heuristics. Under standard regularity assumptions, we establish sublinear regret guarantees for both finite-horizon and infinite-horizon settings. Empirically, experiments on the Meta-World benchmark show UBP2 achieves substantially higher sample efficiency than model-free preference-based methods and non-optimistic model-based baselines.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 现有基于偏好的强化学习方法通常被动收集数据，在早期学习阶段样本效率低下，尤其在反馈稀缺时难以平衡探索与利用。本文关注如何主动引导数据采集，使每次交互更富信息量。其核心问题是：在缺乏真实奖励信号的情况下，如何联合建模奖励、动力学和值函数的不确定性，以实现高效探索。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 论文在连续控制环境中，通过成对轨迹比较提供偏好反馈，训练一个集成的世界模型来预测状态转移和隐含奖励。模型采用模型预测控制进行规划，选择兼具高预期回报与高不确定性的动作序列。评估基于Meta-World操作任务的成功率，衡量在有限偏好预算下的学习效率。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 本文提出UBP2，首次将奖励、动力学与值函数的不确定性统一纳入规划目标，实现乐观探索。实验表明，该方法显著优于无模型及非乐观模型基线，在多数任务上更快达到高性能。其贡献在于验证了多源不确定性协同指导探索的有效性，并提供了亚线性遗憾界支持。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: UBP2使用集成网络估计动态和值函数的总不确定性，用Jensen-Rényi散度量化奖励模型的认知不确定性。规划时最大化结合预期回报与三者不确定性的得分，自动权衡开发与信息获取。偏好查询也经优化，优先标注高奖励且高不确定的片段，增强反馈质量。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 理论依赖高斯过程假设，而实际使用深度集成，二者校准性差异可能影响边界解释力。此外，偏好生成依赖模拟，现实人类反馈的噪声未被充分测试。读者应重点关注其不确定性整合机制与规划目标设计，这对低反馈强化学习具启发意义。

papers.title: The Reward Was in Your Data All Along: Correcting Flow Matching with Discriminator-Guided RL
papers.abstract: Score- and flow-matching models often rely on preference-based reinforcement learning for two purposes: aligning with subjective preferences and, surprisingly, recovering properties such as visual realism and coherent object structure that matching-based training is intended to learn from the data itself. We argue that this reflects a structural mismatch. Matching losses measure $\ell_2$ regression error on the velocity or score field under training-time marginals, a proxy poorly aligned with the visual and semantic properties that determine sample quality at inference. Given a reward aligned with these properties, RL sidesteps the mismatch by evaluating the model on its own samples and following the reward landscape directly. The challenge is to obtain such a reward without relying on human preferences, which are expensive and conflate data realism with annotator inclinations. We propose Discriminator-Guided RL (DRL). DRL trains a discriminator to separate data from base-model samples in a pretrained representation space and uses its logit as the reward in KL-regularized RL. The pretrained space restricts the discriminator to perceptually meaningful directions, and the logit estimates the log-likelihood ratio between data and model, which is the optimal reward for targeting the data distribution. Across SiT, JiT, REPA, and RAE, DRL reduces guidance-free FID (e.g., $9.38 \to 2.62$ on SiT) and semantic-space FD (e.g., $88.2 \to 19.3$ on DINOv3 for SiT), with consistent gains across all backbones, and improves human-preference rewards without training on them. It also yields a better Pareto frontier between preference reward and image fidelity under subsequent preference-based post-training, increasing alignment while reducing low-level artifacts such as oversaturation and excessive brightness.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 现有流匹配模型虽能拟合数据分布，但在生成时仍需依赖人类偏好进行强化学习后训练，以恢复本应从数据中学到的视觉真实性和结构一致性。这暴露了一个结构性错配：匹配损失基于速度场的L2回归，其训练时边际分布与推理时样本路径不一致，导致模型无法充分捕捉数据中蕴含的语义特性。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 论文在图像生成任务上验证方法，输入为噪声与类别标签，输出为图像。模型基于预训练的流匹配模型（如SiT、REPA），通过判别器引导的强化学习进行后训练。评价采用Fréchet距离、人类偏好得分等指标，在ImageNet等标准数据上测试，对比基线模型与不同指导强度下的表现。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 提出判别器引导强化学习（DRL），利用预训练表示空间中的判别器logit作为奖励信号，使模型在无需人类偏好的情况下纠正生成缺陷。结果显示，DRL显著降低FID与语义空间FD，提升偏好得分，并改善后续偏好对齐的帕累托前沿，证明其能有效恢复数据中被传统匹配损失忽略的结构。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: DRL分两阶段：先在冻结的自监督表示空间（如DINOv2）中训练判别器区分真实数据与模型生成样本，其logit作为奖励；再以此奖励驱动KL正则化的强化学习微调生成模型。该方法将最优奖励转化为密度比估计，限制修正方向为感知上有意义的语义轴，从而绕过流匹配的几何错配问题。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 方法依赖预训练表示的质量，且当前RL训练难以兼容分类器自由引导。此外，高λ值可能导致模式收缩。尽管如此，论文揭示了生成模型训练中‘奖励已在数据中’的核心洞见，最值得读的是其对流匹配局限性的理论分析与DRL机制的设计逻辑。

papers.title: Giskard : Byzantine Robust and Confidential Aggregation for Large-Scale Decentralized Learning
papers.abstract: Dealing simultaneously with confidentiality and Byzantine behaviors in decentralized learning is a challenging problem. Indeed, in decentralized learning, clients train a machine learning model while keeping their data locally and share their model parameters or gradients with a set of neighbors. While enforcing confidentiality calls for hiding the exchanged model parameters/gradients (e.g., by using cryptographic techniques), dealing with Byzantine contributions often requires inspecting the latter. Hence, most research works address these objectives separately. A recent line of work proposes to employ secure multi-party computation (MPC) to implement robust aggregators against model poisoning, thereby enforcing both confidentiality and Byzantine resilience. However, these solutions scale badly: they either require all-to-all communication between participants or delegate the entire computation to a small subset, whose computational and communication load grows proportionally with the size of the network. In this paper, we present Giskard, a protocol for confidential and Byzantine-robust decentralized aggregation. Giskard organizes $n$ parties into a tree of committees of size $O(\log n)$ and evaluates a coordinate-wise approximate median via a committee-adapted distributed binary search over the value domain, using BGW-style MPC within each committee. We assess Giskard both theoretically by proving its security and confidentiality properties and experimentally through extensive experiments involving up to one million participants. Compared to its closest competitors, Giskard reduces per-party communication complexity asymptotically while exhibiting comparable model utility under up to $n/4$ Byzantine parties.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 去中心化学习面临两大矛盾挑战：既要防止恶意节点破坏全局模型（拜占庭鲁棒性），又要保护各参与方更新不被窥探（保密性）。传统方法难以兼顾，因鲁棒聚合需检查个体更新，而保密机制却要隐藏它们。现有基于安全多方计算的方案虽能同时满足两者，但通信开销随网络规模线性增长，无法扩展到百万级节点，成为实际部署的主要瓶颈。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 论文研究在大规模去中心化网络中进行保密且抗拜占庭攻击的梯度聚合任务。每个节点持有本地数据并交换模型更新，系统通过分层委员会结构组织通信。输入为各节点私有的梯度向量，输出为近似坐标中位数的聚合结果。评估指标包括通信开销、端到端延迟及模型准确率，在MNIST和CIFAR-10上模拟至百万节点规模，对比不同拓扑下的性能。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文提出Giskard协议，首次实现亚线性通信复杂度下的拜占庭鲁棒与保密聚合。其核心贡献是将坐标中位数计算转化为基于二分搜索的安全计数问题，并通过树状委员会结构分摊计算负载。实验显示，在百万节点下每节点通信量比最优基线低三个数量级，同时保持与经典鲁棒聚合器相当的模型效用，验证了可扩展性与实用性的平衡。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: Giskard将中位数求解转化为多轮二分搜索，每轮通过安全多方计算统计小于当前枢轴的值的数量。关键创新在于采用树形委员会架构：底层节点将比较结果秘密共享给基层委员会，中间层逐级汇总并转发，根委员会重建计数并更新枢轴。整个过程在BGW型秘密共享下执行，结合零知识域证明防止恶意偏移，确保即使存在恶意节点也能正确收敛。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 协议依赖同步网络假设，且二分搜索精度需调参以平衡通信与鲁棒性；在极端非独立同分布数据下的表现未深入探讨。尽管如此，其分治式MPC架构为大规模安全聚合提供了新范式。最值得阅读的是方法设计与通信复杂度分析部分，对构建高效去中心化学习系统具有指导意义。
